name: cryptowerk-cli
description: Hash documents, register them to multiple blockchains, retrieve cryptographic seal proofs, and verify document integrity — all via the Cryptowerk platform.

function.name: cw_config
function.description: Save Cryptowerk API credentials to the local .env config file. Must be called once before using other commands.

endpoint.description: Cryptowerk API endpoint URL including trailing slash, e.g. https://developers.cryptowerk.com/platform/API/v8/

function.name: cw_hash
function.description: Compute the SHA256 hash of a local file, register it to multiple blockchains via Cryptowerk, and save a _seal.json file alongside it containing the retrievalId(s).

file.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to hash and register.

function.name: cw_register
function.description: Register one or more pre-computed SHA256 hash(es) to multiple blockchains via Cryptowerk. Returns retrievalId(s) that can be used to poll for the seal.

hash.description: SHA256 hash to register. For multiple hashes, separate with commas and no spaces, e.g. 'abc123,def456'.

function.name: cw_retrieve
function.description: Poll the Cryptowerk API to retrieve the blockchain seal proof for a previously registered hash. The seal becomes available once the hash has been anchored to the blockchain (may take minutes to hours depending on the chain).

file.description: Path to the _seal.json file produced by cw_hash or cw_register. Mutually exclusive with retrieval_id.

retrieval_id.description: One or more retrievalIds separated by commas. Mutually exclusive with file.

function.name: cw_verify
function.description: Verify that a document's current SHA256 hash matches its blockchain seal, confirming the document has not been altered since registration.

seal_file.description: Path to the _seal.json file containing the retrieved blockchain seal.

doc_file.description: Path to the original document to verify. If omitted, derived by stripping '_seal.json' from the seal file path.

workflow_example: 3. cw retrieve --file ./docs/contract.pdf_seal.json --json   # poll until seal is ready
